programme.title: Vanishing Into the Sunset
programme.desc: Have you noticed that some things look further away than others on a flat surface, almost as if they were about to disappear? In this episode we introduce you to the concept of 'perspective', often used by painters to provide depth to objects.

programme.title: Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that a kite in geometry looks a lot like a kite in the sky? It's no coincidence. In this episode we join Eric on a high-flying mission to unfurl the secret of symmetry used to make kites fly. Is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: No Room For Phobias
programme.desc: Today, Sam and Saira must face their fears as they are called to the zoo to take a blood sample from Bob and Bindi - a pair of very snappy West African dwarf crocodiles. And Tuppence, the one-eyed Jack Russell, needs high-tech radiation therapy treatment.

programme.title: Double Emergency
programme.desc: There's a double emergency at the Vet School. Edward, the ferret, is seriously ill, having stopped eating, and a sick cow with a mystery illness needs investigating. Can the Junior Vets cope when things go wrong?

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: An A-mazing Winter Adventure
programme.desc: The kids must find their way out of Yoko's magical snow labyrinth in order to get to Ranger Loops' puppet show on time!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Fire and Flames
programme.desc: Dry weather caused by climate change has caused a forest fire, and the Black Forest is ablaze. Only the MeteoHeroes can prevent an environmental catastrophe! Pluvia and Nubess are on their way to the North Sea.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Puppy!
programme.desc: Naomi is overjoyed with her new puppy-until it mysteriously vanishes before her friends Carol and Jessi arrive. Convinced it's been stolen, she accuses everyone, but nothing adds up. Did someone really take the puppy, or is there more to the story?

programme.title: Happy Next Birthday!
programme.desc: Oto and Mai throw Vik a basketball-themed birthday party, and Vik learns that the more he plays the sport, the better he gets!

programme.title: Yoko's Computer Game
programme.desc: Yoko gets the kids to appreciate nature by tricking them into thinking the park is actually a computer game!

programme.title: It's Hairy!
programme.desc: Can you lift a car with a ponytail? The doctors put the strength of human hair to the test and find out what makes different colours and types of hair.

programme.title: Admirable Admiral
programme.desc: Eric learns that even if something is made from a material that is denser or heavier than water, it will float if it has the right shape. He makes a paper boat strong enough to carry toy cars without sinking.

programme.title: Heart of a Lion
programme.desc: Ice hockey player Liam takes on men twice his age in an action-packed match, the Icicles are put through their paces at the dress rehearsal for a big competition, and solo skaters Kloe and Beccy head to the British Championships.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: E203 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.title: E6 - Celtic Waves - Ireland
programme.desc: Ireland isn't known for being one of the world's hottest surfing destinations. But in winter surfers head to the village of Mullaghmore, braving the freezing North Atlantic to take on waves as big as multi-storey buildings.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: In the final heat, nine artists from across Australia have just four hours to create portraits of Muster Dogs Season 1 winner Frank Finger and his dog Annie, actor Chloe Hayden and comedian Alex Lee.

programme.title: E6 - Celtic Waves - Ireland
programme.desc: Ireland isn't known for being one of the world's hottest surfing destinations. But in winter surfers head to the village of Mullaghmore, braving the freezing North Atlantic to take on waves as big as multi-storey buildings.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel unpack the latest in federal politics including fuel prices, cost of living and inflation, campaigning ahead of the Farrer by-election and preparations for the Federal Budget to be delivered May 12.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: Celina Edmonds presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: E2 - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 2) The Australian Dream
programme.desc: In the 1950s three quarters of Australians were homeowners. Nowadays, house prices have sky rocketed and younger generations largely feel locked out. So where did it all go wrong?

programme.title: E2 - Spies In The Outback - Politics, Pressure And Protest
programme.desc: As the Cold War enters the 70s, it becomes clear Pine Gap is really a spy base with eyes on the Soviets, and it's putting Alice Springs in the nuclear crosshairs. How far will the US go to keep the secret?

programme.title: E3 - Pies
programme.desc: Guided by a pie-tastic team in Perth, Dr Karl embarks on a culinary odyssey to uncover how Australia's iconic meat pies are made.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E619 - Fruit
programme.desc: It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice, to make him big and strong. Roar!

programme.title: E624 - The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: E204 - Pups Save The Diving Bell / Pups Save The Beavers
programme.desc: While the Turbots are deep sea diving, their diving bell ends up stuck! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A storm washes away a beaver's dam, so he chomps all the wood at Farmer Yumi's! The PAW Patrol arrives to help rebuild his home!

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E726 - Grandpa Pig's Greenhouse
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandpa Dog are showing and sharing their lovely, tomato filled, Greenhouses to Peppa and George.

programme.title: E724 - George's Wooly Hat
programme.desc: George has a new hat and Mummy Pig is determined that George doesn't get it muddy when visiting Grandpa and Granny Pig.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E310 - The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E607 - Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save The Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: E401 - Backpack's Charm / Lost Banana Blankie
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E207 - Rock Pools
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig take Peppa and George to a beach with lots of rocks and little rock pools to explore. They all have fun with a little crab, a seashell and a fossil. Peppa rescues a little fish in her bucket and puts it back in the sea.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E806 - Tire Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and his pals are gearing up for a big race with brand new tires! But when Crusher tricks Starla, Darington and Stripes into putting on out-of-control SILLY tires, it's up to Blaze to rescue them and beat Crusher to the finish line!

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E411 - Volleybull! / Diferente Es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: E702 - Parachute Jump
programme.desc: The school roof is leaking so Mummy Pig does a parachute jump to raise money to fix it!

programme.title: E704 - Miss Rabbit's Taxi
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit spends the day picking people up and dropping people off in her job as taxi driver.

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E724 - George's Wooly Hat
programme.desc: George has a new hat and Mummy Pig is determined that George doesn't get it muddy when visiting Grandpa and Granny Pig.

programme.title: E726 - Grandpa Pig's Greenhouse
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandpa Dog are showing and sharing their lovely, tomato filled, Greenhouses to Peppa and George.

programme.title: E411 - Volleybull! / Diferente Es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.desc: The collections at the Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum also include works by some of the greatest modern painters, such as: Monet, Morisot, Van Gogh, Gauguin, Derain, van Dongen, Cezanne, Braque, Kandinsky...

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 2
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Women In Asia. Guardians Of Nature
programme.desc: Their stories inspire others to connect with nature. Women who are role models, leaders, educators and campaigners are paving the way for future generations. They want to share their awareness and understanding of nature with other women, tackling the lack of inclusion and representation in all outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Ghana's Returnees Long Street Debate
programme.desc: In this week's show, Edith Kimani meets with Afro-Americans who have relocated to Ghana and locals to explore the challenges and opportunities sparked by the 'Year of Return'.

programme.title: How Can Wildlife Accidents Be Avoided?
programme.desc: Collisions with wildlife. How can they be prevented? What happens to the animals that survive crashes with cars going at speeds of 100 km/h or more? How do elephants react? What should drivers do when an animal suddenly appears on the road? And could high-tech systems prevent these collisions?

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. programme.title: Sudan's Civil War - The Limits Of Humanitarian Aid
programme.desc: In Sudan, the government is waging a bloody civil war against rebels. An estimated 12 million people have fled their homes, either to destinations within the country or to neighboring states. Many of them are seeking help in Chad.

programme.title: Good Skin Care, Skin Cancer Screenings And Removing Tattoos

programme.title: Stumbling Stones - Lest We Forget
programme.desc: ‘Stolpersteine', or ‘stumbling stones' placed in the pavement commemorate the victims of Nazism. The squares are made of brass and measure 10cm x 10cm. More than 100,000 of these memorial plaques have been laid in over 30 countries.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - Episode 3
programme.desc: Join the search for a Cooper’s hawk who’s taken a dangerous dip in a backyard pool. Catch the hijinks of the centre’s skunks as they try to avoid getting their shots, giving the team a closeup experience with the animals’ stinky natural defences.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E4 - Crowded Islands
programme.desc: On rocky islands off the coast of South Africa, thousands of creatures congregate to breed. Among these, huge colonies of cape gannets dominate. Surrounded by rich waters, they can find enough to feed themselves and their young. But life is full of challenges for the breeding gannets...

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E8 - Arabia: Kingdom of the Sun
programme.desc: Visit one of the most arid and hottest parts of the world to discover how dhub lizards and dromedary camels adapted to withstand the intense conditions. Then move into the more moderate southern mountains, where rare hyrax and chameleons forage.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs

programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: Rainbow Rumble[Live]
programme.desc: Rainbow Rumble is ABS-CBN's latest trivia game show hosted by Luis Manzano. Five players race to reach the peak of a color pyramid by answering trivia questions and rolling a color die. Whoever reaches the peak goes to the jackpot round for a chance to win one million pesos.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

E401 - A Day In Bed/Karting Bean/Bowled Over/Sample Sale/Grounded
programme.desc: Mr Bean decides to stay in bed all day – even when making his breakfast, brushing his teeth and ordering a pizza!

programme.title: E260 - Xingo's World/The Feels/Past Aliens Present/Dreamtime/The Greatest Lake
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on the road again and are supposed to be taking in the beautiful sights, but Ben refuses to put his video games away.

programme.title: E121 - Ask Not What Bunnies Can Do For You
programme.desc: It’s student council elections at Acme Loo! Babs and Buster both run for President, and they enlist Sweetie and Hamton as their respective campaign managers. That just leaves Plucky…who happily revels in the drama!

programme.title: E24 - But I Have A Receipt/This Is My Jam
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby try to return a mediocre role-playing board game (The Realm of Darthon) to a grumpy store manager.

programme.title: Lego Dc Shazam: Magic And Monsters -Lego Dc Shazam: Magic And Monsters!
programme.desc: With the shout of a word, 10-year-old Billy Batson transforms into an adult Super Hero! Join the good fight with this giant-sized LEGO® DC adventure!

programme.title: E344 - Tam-Tam Lemming/Ice Madness!/In Your Dreams
programme.desc: Grizzy is brutally awakened by four Lemmings who are giving a grand percussion concert near the cabin, while the rest of the group dances to the rhythm.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E29 - Take Good Care Of Your Teeth/The Doberman's Favorite/A Fun Day Mushroom Hunting/Boast
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected at a tooth exhibition. Shiro examines the various models of animal teeth when Deca begins chasing after Shiro.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John Learns About Yummy Food!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about yummy food! First, he explores the world of vegetables & learns that they are not only delicious but also essential for staying strong & healthy. Then, the family has fun making & tasting all sorts of delicious & healthy fruit juices. The tasty adventure continues as the kids learn to make colorful popsicles with yummy fruits & Miss Hannah turns healthy fruit into fun animal faces!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E3 - Mindful Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John Learns About Yummy Food!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about yummy food! First, he explores the world of vegetables & learns that they are not only delicious but also essential for staying strong & healthy. Then, the family has fun making & tasting all sorts of delicious & healthy fruit juices. The tasty adventure continues as the kids learn to make colorful popsicles with yummy fruits & Miss Hannah turns healthy fruit into fun animal faces!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E2 - 102
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Ella and Sa who are searching for a million dollar property in the bay side of Melbourne

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: Train To Busan
programme.desc: A mysterious viral outbreak pushes Korea into a state of emergency! As an unidentified virus sweeps the country, Korean government declares martial law. Those on an express train to Busan, a city that has successfully fended off the viral outbreak, must fight for their own survival... 453 km from Seoul to Busan. The struggle to survive by those who have others to protect! Get on board to stay alive!

programme.title: Annapurna
programme.desc: On a sunny spring day, Kang Hyun goes hiking in Bugaksan Mountain with Sun Woo who has been recently discharged from the military. It is already past noon but they continue a casual conversation about their past relationships while hiking along trails. Kang Hyun reminisces about the bittersweet memories of his exes ‘Anna' and ‘Eun Chae', while Sun Woo regrets treating his ex ‘Eun Jung' badly and blames his immaturity in the past relationship with ‘Pureum'.Kang Hyun and Sun Woo come across different people along the trail. They pass by a good-looking woman in tight leggings who instantly capture their eyes. They also come across a middle-aged man who gives disappointing hiking tips, which make them feel hopeless. ‘Anna' and ‘Pureum' incarnate our bygone lovers who we once strongly admired but failed to reach.Though hiking is as tough as life can be, it can also bring you joy because some people come into our lives and make us happy. Though Annapurna is one of the toughest moun

programme.title: The Eight Hundred
programme.desc: The film is based on true stories taking place during Sino-Japanese war in Shanghai, China, in 1937, the battle and protection of the Si Hang Warehouse. There are around 400 soldiers (so called Eight Hundred Heroes in history), holding out against numerous waves of Japanese forces for 4 days and 4 nights...

programme.title: E12 - 愛情需要精密計算嗎？
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E1 - Macc
programme.desc: MACC. The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: E7 - Gina Goetter, Hasbro
programme.desc: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro. She's the architect of the company's transformation, diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.

The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. programme.title: All's Well, Ends Well 97
programme.desc: Old Mr. Lao has three sons and the youngest one Lao Kung is his favorite. However, Kung does nothing but fool around all day long. Old Mr. Lao is very annoyed about this. The relationship between father and son is thus affected. So on Kung‘s birthday, his two brothers decide to play a joke on him. They trick him into believing he has won the lottery. Kung is so happy that he spends a tremendous amount of money. When he realizes he is in huge debt, he pretends to go insane and the whole family believes him. They take great care of him and confide in him. It is this pretence that makes Kung grows up and he and his father finally end in good terms.
